introSection: Megafobia is a wooden roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Oakwood Theme Park in Narberth, Pembrokeshire, Wales, UK. It was built by Custom Coasters International, Inc. who wanted a ride to showcase their company in Europe. Megafobia has a twister-style layout.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Opened in 1996, Megafobia was the first major attraction to be installed at Oakwood Theme Park (then Oakwood Leisure Park).

The ride was refurbished for the 2023 season by the Gravity Group. Around 40% of the track was replaced and the first drop was made steeper. It reopened in July 2023.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Megafobia is tall and reaches a speed of. On rainy days, however, the ride can reach.

fullText:
Megafobia is a wooden roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Oakwood Theme Park in Narberth, Pembrokeshire, Wales, UK. It was built by Custom Coasters International, Inc. who wanted a ride to showcase their company in Europe. Megafobia has a twister-style layout.

Opened in 1996, Megafobia was the first major attraction to be installed at Oakwood Theme Park (then Oakwood Leisure Park).

The ride was refurbished for the 2023 season by the Gravity Group. Around 40% of the track was replaced and the first drop was made steeper. It reopened in July 2023.

Megafobia is tall and reaches a speed of. On rainy days, however, the ride can reach.
